Our Story

A decade of dressing brides in gold & calm

Honey Bridal Salon began on a quiet first floor in Piravom with one belief — that a bride should feel completely herself before she ever feels made up. Over ten years, that belief has draped more than five hundred kasavu sarees and steadied as many nervous mornings.

We work in the language of Kerala weddings: temple gold, jasmine, paddy-green backdrops and the soft light of an early muhurtham. Whether it's a traditional kasavu look or a modern reception glow, every face is read first, then painted.

500+Brides Styled
10+Years in Piravom
4.9★Bride Rating
